prompt_improvements.improvement: Require the implementor to declare a single owning module for each structured log event name and avoid duplicate event emission across layers.
prompt_improvements.rationale: Prevents duplicate telemetry records and ambiguous dashboard/alert interpretation.

prompt_improvements.improvement: Require tests to validate both presence and exact count of required log events, plus required extra fields per event.
prompt_improvements.rationale: Makes acceptance criteria around observability precise and regression-resistant.

prompt_improvements.improvement: Require a direct mapping of each acceptance criterion to one or more test assertions in the PR description or results artifact.
prompt_improvements.rationale: Improves review speed and reduces missed requirements.
